name: Drew
subject: Mississippi is no place for Elizabeth Warren
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cindy Hyde-Smith for US Senate
body:
_Please see a special message from our sponsor._
Right now, it looks like a runoff election is on the horizon as Liberals pour last-minute money into Mike Espy’s campaign.

Fellow Conservative,

We knew Mike Espy was courting Liberal Elites to stock his war chest in order to buy Democratic votes, but this is worse than we thought. **Elizabeth Warren and her leftist cronies are pleading to Democrats across the country to help Mike Espy fund his attack campaign against Mississippi’s conservative values.**

It’s time to show Elizabeth Warren and the rest of the coastal elites, **Mississippi can’t be bought.**

They’re stocking up millions to attack Cindy Hyde-Smith during these last few days. We need your help if we’re going to fight back and come out on top. [**Will you strengthen Cindy’s fight against the radical coastal liberal elites like Elizabeth Warren?**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzI5LTc2YjQ2MDhkYmY3YzQ0YzM4MjIwZGUxOGU3NThlYTU0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3ASHlwZXJsaW5rXzIwMTgxMTE1XzEyMDAwNjYwMg%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLnZpY3RvcnlwYXNzcG9ydC5jb20vaHlkZXNtaXRoL2RvbmF0ZS10b2RheS1hZS1ycy8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPUFFLVJTJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDE4MTEyNV9BRS1SU19oeWRlc21pdGgmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAxODExMjVfV2FycmVu&K=DsuvrIeGHWjTS00byxu6fg)

[Chip in $150 to save Mississippi from coastal elites](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzI5LTc2YjQ2MDhkYmY3YzQ0YzM4MjIwZGUxOGU3NThlYTU0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3ASHlwZXJsaW5rXzIwMTgxMTE1XzEyMDAyOTg1Mg%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLnZpY3RvcnlwYXNzcG9ydC5jb20vaHlkZXNtaXRoL2RvbmF0ZS10b2RheS1hZS1ycy8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPUFFLVJTJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDE4MTEyNV9BRS1SU19oeWRlc21pdGgmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAxODExMjVfV2FycmVu&K=0m6A7juJC-4P3r7kMW6HBg)

[Chip in $25 to save Mississippi from coastal elites](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzI5LTc2YjQ2MDhkYmY3YzQ0YzM4MjIwZGUxOGU3NThlYTU0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3ASHlwZXJsaW5rXzIwMTgxMTE1XzEyMDAzOTE2NA%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLnZpY3RvcnlwYXNzcG9ydC5jb20vaHlkZXNtaXRoL2RvbmF0ZS10b2RheS1hZS1ycy8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPUFFLVJTJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDE4MTEyNV9BRS1SU19oeWRlc21pdGgmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAxODExMjVfV2FycmVu&K=8VdN0ctVJu0IophP7KurOA)
[Chip in any amount to save Mississippi from coastal elites](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzI5LTc2YjQ2MDhkYmY3YzQ0YzM4MjIwZGUxOGU3NThlYTU0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3ASHlwZXJsaW5rXzIwMTgxMTE1XzEyMDA0MjE2NQ%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLnZpY3RvcnlwYXNzcG9ydC5jb20vaHlkZXNtaXRoL2RvbmF0ZS10b2RheS1hZS1ycy8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPUFFLVJTJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDE4MTEyNV9BRS1SU19oeWRlc21pdGgmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAxODExMjVfV2FycmVu&K=eIHkhJLahh2vnft4cwWwiw)**

**Money might buy Elizabeth Warren her seat, but it won’t work here in Mississippi.**

Read her desperate plea below and help us fight back today.

Thank you,
Drew
_Team Hyde-Smith_

\--Begin Forwarded Message--

Friend,

Late last year, everyone's eyes were on Alabama.

Doug Jones was fighting his way uphill to beat Roy Moore and get elected as a Democratic Senator from a Deep South state.

And in D.C. and across the country, we had his back. We weren't just watching, waiting, and biting our fingernails -- we jumped into the fight.

**Last year, this grassroots army helped Doug Jones win in Alabama. Together, this month, we can write the sequel -- by helping Democrat Mike Espy win his Senate runoff in Mississippi on November 27th.**

[**Will you chip in $1, or whatever you can afford, to support Democrats like Mike Espy? If we can win Alabama, we can win Mississippi. But Mike Espy's got a tough fight on his hands in these final two weeks, and your donation -- any amount -- will go a long way toward electing Democratic candidates like him to the Senate.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzI5LTc2YjQ2MDhkYmY3YzQ0YzM4MjIwZGUxOGU3NThlYTU0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3ASHlwZXJsaW5rXzIwMTgxMTE1XzEyMDIyMDYwMA%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLnZpY3RvcnlwYXNzcG9ydC5jb20vaHlkZXNtaXRoL2RvbmF0ZS10b2RheS1hZS1ycy8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPUFFLVJTJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDE4MTEyNV9BRS1SU19oeWRlc21pdGgmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAxODExMjVfV2FycmVu&K=HwdgkktvauaLxieHq0z3Fg)

Last week, Mike Espy nearly tied the Republican he's now up against in the runoff. And the state GOP is divided -- still cleaning up after a messy internal food fight between two Republican candidates who scrambled to out-Trump each other.

Mike Espy, a former Congressman and Secretary of Agriculture during the Clinton administration, could make history as Mississippi's first African American Senator since Reconstruction. Meanwhile, his opponent – who was appointed to fill this Senate seat in April – just got caught on camera making an appalling comment about going to a "public hanging," in a state where lynchings are in living memory.

**Every election is a chance to fight for our values. Mike Espy would make us proud, and Mississippi needs a Senator who brings people together.**

Republicans know that Mike Espy would be a fierce fighter for health care and Social Security. They don't like that. So they've been calling in the cavalry. Donald Trump crashed into the state for a rally last month, and the GOP and their corporate backers have spent over $2 million to support Mike's opponent and run nasty attack ads against him.

Now, it's time to help Mike Espy fight back, just like we did for Doug Jones. That victory didn't come out of nowhere – it came from the grassroots army that we've been building across the country. It came from people like you.

[**We can finish strong in this election by electing Democratic Senate candidates like Mike Espy -- but it's going to take a strong showing from all of us. Please donate now.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzI5LTc2YjQ2MDhkYmY3YzQ0YzM4MjIwZGUxOGU3NThlYTU0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3ASHlwZXJsaW5rXzIwMTgxMTE1XzEyMDIzMjU4Mg%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLnZpY3RvcnlwYXNzcG9ydC5jb20vaHlkZXNtaXRoL2RvbmF0ZS10b2RheS1hZS1ycy8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPUFFLVJTJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDE4MTEyNV9BRS1SU19oeWRlc21pdGgmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAxODExMjVfV2FycmVu&K=_nYvnsfaZGQLpX32Btm9xA)

Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

**P.S. Last week, Democrats won seats in South Carolina, Georgia, Kansas, Oklahoma, and Texas.[We can win tough seats like the one in Mississippi – but only if we have your help. Please chip in now.](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzI5LTc2YjQ2MDhkYmY3YzQ0YzM4MjIwZGUxOGU3NThlYTU0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3ASHlwZXJsaW5rXzIwMTgxMTE1XzEyMDI0ODA5NA%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLnZpY3RvcnlwYXNzcG9ydC5jb20vaHlkZXNtaXRoL2RvbmF0ZS10b2RheS1hZS1ycy8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPUFFLVJTJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDE4MTEyNV9BRS1SU19oeWRlc21pdGgmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAxODExMjVfV2FycmVu&K=UlchNdJPwn_dfsehsDSW5Q)**
